acceptance_criteria.text: File exists at design/running.html; design/ dir exists.
proof: ls design/ returns agents.html landing.html running.html wizard.html

acceptance_criteria.text: Doctype, html lang, charset utf-8, viewport meta.
Exactly one <title>, <= 5 words.
Zero interactive elements.
Exactly one <h1>, inner text byte-equals 'Spawning your agent.'
proof: h1 inner text: 'Spawning your agent.' (3 words, trailing period, no ? or !)

acceptance_criteria.text: Heading mentions agent/spawn/spawning/provisioning.

Single

inner text byte-equals 'This usually takes under sixty seconds.'
proof: p inner text: 'This usually takes under sixty seconds.' (6 words, within 6..12 range, no ! ? em-dash en-dash)

acceptance_criteria.text: Marketing buzzword ban.
proof: grep -ci returns 0 for each of: revolutionary, seamless, unleash, harness, empower, best-in-class, world-class, cutting-edge, leverage, synergy, streamline, next-generation, game-changer, transform, we're excited, introducing, unlock

acceptance_criteria.text: Em-dash (U+2014) and en-dash (U+2013) ban.
proof: python3 byte scan: chr(0x2014) count 0; chr(0x2013) count 0

acceptance_criteria.text: No ! in visible body text (<style> and comments stripped).
proof: Stripped visible body text contains 0 '!' characters

acceptance_criteria.text: Crypto-hidden ban for 11 terms.
proof: grep -ciw returns 0 for each of: X-Layer, EVM, chain, gas, signature, USDC, ETH, blockchain, crypto, 0x, wallet

acceptance_criteria.text: No scripts, external resources, @import, :// outside comments, or CDN hosts.
proof: ':// count after stripping HTML and CSS comments = 0

acceptance_criteria.text: Exactly one <style> block in <head>; zero inline style= attributes.
:root tokens byte-identical to landing.html; /* theme: dark */ comment precedes.
proof: '/* theme: dark */' comment precedes the :root { line in running.html

acceptance_criteria.text: body font-family byte-exact landing stack.
proof: body CSS declares font-family: "JetBrains Mono", "IBM Plex Mono", "SF Mono", "Fira Code", ui-monospace, monospace

acceptance_criteria.text: Option A: zero var(--accent) references; exactly one --accent: declaration.
Responsive via @media (max-width:...) OR fluid units on heading.
File size strictly less than 10240 bytes.
Visible body word count strictly less than 40.
proof: Stripped body text: 'Spawning your agent. This usually takes under sixty seconds.'

acceptance_criteria.text: Exactly one <h1>, zero <h2>..<h6>.
No text-transform: or transform: anywhere.
Collateral check: landing/wizard/agents untouched; ls design/ returns 4 entries.
proof: pre-build sha256 captured to artifacts/prior-designs-pre.sha256 BEFORE edits
post-build sha256 captured to artifacts/prior-designs-post.sha256 AFTER edits
ls design/ | sort returns: agents.html, landing.html, running.html, wizard.html

acceptance_criteria.text: No regressions on 10 prior tasks (excluding tdd-agent-deployer).
